title: Assistant Store Manager - Berger Silk Store - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Berger Silk Store - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
We at Berger Silk Store are looking for an experienced Assistant Store Manager based out of Visakhapatnam. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Berger Silk Store:
Berger Silk Store is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Customer Service

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Berger Silk Store!
